zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Berners於1418年6月1日出生在英國英格蘭素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利時，她的父親Sir Richard Berners30歲，母親Philippa Dalyngruge20歲。她於1432年6月1日與John Bowsey在英國巴金哈姆爾丁頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年12月18日在英國德比夏爾蕾托 伊頓享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞傑千。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Berners于1418年6月1日出生在英国英格兰素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利时，她的父亲Sir Richard Berners30岁，母亲Philippa Dalyngruge20岁。她于1432年6月1日与John Bowsey在英国巴金哈姆爾丁頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年12月18日在英国德比夏爾蕾托 伊頓享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞傑千。

nameMeanings.name: Berners
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Bernières (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Berners was born on 1 June 1418, in West Horsley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Berners, was 30 and her mother, Philippa Dalyngruge, was 20. She married John Bowsey on 1 June 1432, in Cheddington, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 18 December 1475, in Little Eaton, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Chertsey, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Berners est née le 1 juin 1418, à West Horsley, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Berners, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Philippa Dalyngruge, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Bowsey le 1 juin 1432, à Cheddington, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 décembre 1475, à Little Eaton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Chertsey, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Berners am 1. Juni 1418 in West Horsley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Berners 30 und ihre Mutter Philippa Dalyngruge 20. Sie hat am 1. Juni 1432 in Cheddington, Buckinghamshire, England John Bowsey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Dezember 1475 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Little Eaton, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Chertsey, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Berners è nata il il 1 giugno 1418 nel West Horsley, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Berners, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Philippa Dalyngruge, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Bowsey il 1 giugno 1432, nel Cheddington, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 18 dicembre 1475, nel Little Eaton, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Chertsey, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Bernersが1418年6月1日にイギリスイギリススリーウエスト ホールスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Bernersは30歳，母Philippa Dalyngrugeは20歳であった。1432年6月1日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェッドイントンでJohn Bowseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年12月18日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアリットル エアトンで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーチェルトセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Berners(이)가 1418년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 웨스트 호르슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Berners(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Dalyngruge(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1432년 6월 1일 영국 벅잉함실르 체딩턴에서 John Bowsey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 12월 18일 영국 더비실르 리틀 이턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 처츠이에 묻혔다.

pt.1 June 1418–18 December 1475: 1 de junho de 1418–18 de dezembro de 1475
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Berners nasceu em 1 de junho de 1418, em West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Berners, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Dalyngruge, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bowsey em 1 de junho de 1432, em Cheddington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1475, em Little Eaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Berners родилась 1 июня 1418 г. в местности вест хаурсли, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Berners было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Dalyngruge, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bowsey 1 июня 1432 г. в местности чеддингтон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 декабря 1475 г. в местности литл эатон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности чирци, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 June 1418–18 December 1475: 1 de junio de 1418–18 de diciembre de 1475
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Berners nació el 1 de junio de 1418, en West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Berners, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Philippa Dalyngruge, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Bowsey el 1 de junio de 1432, en Cheddington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 18 de diciembre de 1475, en Little Eaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
